name: 1 Under Golf
about: 1 Under Golf is an indoor golf training facility focused on serious golfers seeking to improve their game through data-driven practice and coaching. The venue utilizes state-of-the-art Trackman technology to provide real-time shot analysis and track progress, allowing golfers to practice with purpose year-round. Membership options are available for 24/7 access, along with coaching programs and custom club fitting services. The facility is suited for those who want to make faster improvements at all phases of their golf game with professional-grade tools and personalized instruction.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman technology provides real-time data analysis to track improvement
24/7 member access allows flexible practice schedules
Personalized coaching programs tailored to individual goals

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor providing real-time shot tracking and data analysis

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own clubs as they are not provided. Custom club fitting services are available if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time varies depending on the simulator software and course, but typically 1-2 hours for a full round.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers coaching programs for juniors and youth golfers of all skill levels.
